title: stelis capsula
intro: Stelis capsula is a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Stelis capsula include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Stelis capsula is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat conditions such as hypertension and respiratory issues.
